privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a Kubernetes microservices architecture diagram for Google Online Boutique, a real cloud-native application from GoogleCloudPlatform/microservices-demo. The task uses 11 microservices (frontend, cartservice, productcatalogservice, currencyservice, paymentservice, shippingservice, emailservice, checkoutservice, recommendationservice, adservice, loadgenerator) written in Go (4), Node.js (2), Python (3), C# (1), and Java (1). The YAML manifest specifies real service ports (frontend:8080, cartservice:7070, productcatalogservice:3550, etc.) and actual dependency relationships from the official Google application. The diagram will contain 13 shapes (11 services + redis-cart + ingress-gateway) and 16 edges representing gRPC and HTTP connections between services. The architecture requires two pages: Service Architecture diagram and Service Inventory table. All metadata values are verified against the official Google Online Boutique repository and official Google Cloud documentation.
